pr.title: Add Modal 8xH100 timed validation non-record submission

output.summary: 10-minute Modal 8xH100 run reuses the current train_gpt.py snapshot with the published FineWeb sp1024 export and int8+zlib serialization for a timed validation non-record entry.
techniques: 8xH100 torchrun under a 600s wallclock cap for timed validation
FineWeb sp1024 data with 9-layer, 512-dim GPT settings
Int8+zlib roundtrip serialization of the final checkpoint
